name: Paithani
overview: Godavari, an artisan, is globally famous for her handmade Paithani sarees. When she decides to retire, her daughter sets out to get her the gift of a lifetime - the last Paithani she wove.

trailers.title: Paithani | Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original | Mrinal Kulkarni, Eisha Singh | Premieres 15th Nov
